name: Tramp Iron Removal
description: Remove ferrous tramp metal before it reaches crushers, screens or process equipment.

name: Crusher Protection
description: Reduce the risk of crusher damage from bolts, tools, teeth and other ferrous objects.

name: Conveyor Belt Protection
description: Protect conveyor systems and transfer points with correctly positioned magnetic equipment.

name: Ferrous Metal Recovery
description: Recover ferrous material from recycling, processing and bulk handling streams.

name: Self-Cleaning Magnetic Separation
description: Use automatic discharge where manual cleaning is impractical or unsafe.

name: Heavy-Duty Mining Applications
description: Select equipment for continuous operation, heavy loads and large lump sizes.

name: High-Temperature Applications
description: Confirm magnet configuration for elevated ambient or material temperatures.

name: Outdoor and Dusty Environments
description: Review dust, weather exposure and maintenance access before configuration.

name: Coastal and Corrosive Environments
description: Consider humidity, corrosion resistance and outdoor electrical protection.

name: Remote Mining Sites
description: Plan durable equipment, spare parts and logistics for limited maintenance access.
